candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; identical to Net sales and suitable as top-line revenue.
This is COGS, not revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Direct sales/revenue line; appropriate top-line revenue label.

variables.notes: Use revenue labels as a priority list; Net sales is the most specific top-line label, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Primary consolidated cost of sales line; matches direct production/service costs.
Relevant conceptually but appears blank and narrower than the combined cost line.
Relevant conceptually but appears blank and narrower than the combined cost line.

candidates.row_label: Own Work Capitalized - Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: A component/offset to COGS, not the full COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold - remaining
candidates.why: Residual component, not the full COGS line.
Also a valid total COGS label; identical to Cost of Goods and Services Sold.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Selected the main COGS total line rather than components or residual rows.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A personnel cost component.
Operating overhead-type expense, though somewhat unusual/nonrecurring.
Explicitly excluded by SG&A rules because D&A should not be included.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses important SG&A component labels present in the sheet, especially Advertising Expenses and Other Operating Expenses - remaining. I excluded Depreciation/Amortization in SGA per rules and avoided subtotal rows like Other Operating Expense / Operating (Income)/Expense, Net. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Advertising Expenses, [Income Statement] Other Operating Expenses - remaining
No dedicated research and development expense line is present on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct match to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower component, not the preferred main interest expense line.
Finance expense but not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate-style disclosure, less preferred than the primary line.
Broader finance expense line; acceptable fallback only if direct interest expense unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the specific interest expense line first, with Total Financial Expense as broader fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for parent/common equity and preferable to total equity when minority interest is separate.
This is minority interest, not book equity attributable to shareholders.
Total/general equity line; usable fallback if label changes.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Use shareholder equity first; general Equity is a fallback label. Minority interest appears separate but empty, so BE should exclude it.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution item, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution item and appears empty.

Correct concept for MIB, but appears not reported/populated in provided statements.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
